description: A mutual exclusion primitive for protecting shared data. Only one thread can access the data at a time. Python equivalent: threading.Lock(), but Rust enforces it at compile time.

methods.name: new
methods.description: Creates a new mutex wrapping the given value.

methods.name: lock
methods.description: Acquires the mutex, blocking until it is available. Returns a guard that releases on drop.

methods.name: try_lock
methods.description: Attempts to acquire the mutex without blocking.

methods.name: is_poisoned
methods.description: Returns true if the mutex has been poisoned (a thread panicked while holding it).

methods.name: into_inner
methods.description: Consumes the mutex and returns the inner value.
